decline_reason: I attempted to audit the provider-routing code paths, but the live sandbox did not mount the advertised repository snapshot under /workspace, so the target source files were not readable. I also confirmed the bundled praxis CLI is broken in this image because python3 cannot import the stdlib json module; the operator needs to hydrate the repo into the sandbox or provide a documented snapshot reader and a working praxis client/runtime before this audit can be completed as specified.

links.label: BUG-17CC1088
links.ref: Workflow review step_3 sandbox missing target repo and broken praxis CLI runtime

links.label: BUG-632E6F45
links.ref: Workflow review sandbox advertises repo snapshot but does not mount readable repo files; bundled praxis CLI shim also fails due missing json stdlib

links.label: operator_decision.architecture_policy.provider_routing.cli_default_api_exception
links.ref: CLI is the provider execution lane for every use case unless explicitly overridden
